course_title: INTRODUCTION TO THE PHYSICAL THERAPY PROFESSION AND PROFESSIONALISM
description: Professional attitudes, beliefs, behaviors relevant to physical therapy practice through the Guide to Physical Therapist Practice, APTA history, Generic Abilities, APTA Code of Ethics, APTA Core Values, PT roles and practice settings, professional autonomy, health care teams, professional learning opportunities.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Doctor of Physical Therapy program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Doctor of Physical Therapy program
